subject: Cloud Computing
title: Alibaba Cloud: China's Giant
description: One-minute skill: Alibaba Cloud: China's Giant.

hook.text: Outside the U.S., the cloud market looks different. In China, Alibaba Cloud is the dominant force.

buildup.text: Alibaba Cloud launched in 2009 and controls over 30% of China's cloud market — more than AWS locally.

discovery.text: It handles Singles' Day, the world's largest shopping event, processing 583,000 orders per second.

twist.text: Chinese regulations restrict foreign cloud providers. This protection built Alibaba's dominance at home.

climax.text: Alibaba Cloud is expanding globally, but geopolitical tensions make competing with AWS outside China difficult.

punchline.text: China's cloud king rules at home. The world stage is harder.

quiz.question: Why does Alibaba Cloud dominate the Chinese market?
options: It launched early and Chinese regulations limit foreign cloud providers
Alibaba Cloud is free for all Chinese companies
AWS and Azure refuse to operate in China
